scripts.lint: python3 scripts/ensure_venv.py && .venv/bin/python -m ruff check . && .venv/bin/python -m ruff format --check . && .venv/bin/python manage.py check --settings=config.settings.test
scripts.typecheck: python3 scripts/ensure_venv.py && .venv/bin/python -m compileall -q config canonos && .venv/bin/python manage.py check --settings=config.settings.test
scripts.migrations:check: python3 scripts/ensure_venv.py && .venv/bin/python manage.py check_migrations --settings=config.settings.test && .venv/bin/python manage.py makemigrations --check --dry-run --settings=config.settings.test
scripts.seed: node ../../scripts/run-with-root-env.mjs bash -lc "cd apps/api && python3 scripts/ensure_venv.py && .venv/bin/python manage.py seed_demo_data --settings=config.settings.local"
